work_completed: Inspected merged PR #31 metadata and changed files for the npm scope rename and validator/schema restoration.

Kept changes documentation-only plus required agent registration/handoff records.
handoff_record.next_agent_notes: If future package-scope or validator changes land, check docs/development-process.md, docs/implementation-guide.md, and docs/canonical-toi-migration.md for drift before adding new docs.
